tweets.text:
May 21: Homeland Security Task Forces supporting the @FIFAWorldCup. 

Our 59 regional Homeland Security Task Forces (HSTFs) are a powerful tool in the FBI’s FIFA support. Authorized by President Trump’s executive order in January 2025, HSTFs have been huge force multipliers in crushing crime through historic interagency collaboration – enabling the FBI and our partners to disrupt criminal cartels, foreign gangs, and transnational criminal organizations at record levels. These efforts have helped keep the scourges of drug and weapons trafficking, human smuggling, homicide, and other forms of cross border crime and violence from reaching our shores and victimizing innocent Americans. 

The coordination we’ve built since will be critical working in tandem with local, state, federal, and international officials to share intelligence in real time and deploy tactics to help ensure a safe, enjoyable tournament for all. 

The FBI encourages everyone to come forward if you see suspicious activity in your communities. Contact us at https://t.co/m55w5cr9Xw or 1-800-CALL-FBI.

author.description: Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation, #9

tweets.text:
The true work of this FBI’s historic year in crime reduction are the stories behind the record breaking stats —

Today’s: This @FBI saved a 12 year old child from an alleged abuser.

Recently, out of @FBINewHaven’s Child Exploitation Task Force with local partners, we arrested Bryan Cruz Solano (20) on federal charges of Sexual Exploitation of a Child.

Law enforcement had received a tip that Cruz was distributing child sexual abuse material including videos of himself with the 12 year old.

After investigators moved rapidly, Cruz was arrested and will face justice - after additional photos and videos of the victim had been found in his residence during the search.

Thank you to our teams and partners for stepping up to protect the innocent.
https://t.co/djiSahPnCo
